passives.name: Cleave
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] deal {{as|{{rd|40% AD|20% AD}}|ad}} {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 350 radius centered around the target.

active.name: Crescent
active.effects: Deal {{as|75% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 450 radius in front of you.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal 40% (20% for ranged) AD physical damage to other enemies in a 350 radius around the target.
Active: Deal 75% AD physical damage to enemies in a 450 radius in front of you.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Cleave damage differs for melee vs ranged (40% vs 20% AD).
Execution-semantics review: Crescent is not instant; cast time follows the user's attack windup and cooldown starts after cast completion.
Cleave applies splash damage to nearby secondary enemies and does not trigger on structure hits; Crescent resolves as an auto-targeted area cast offset in front of the user.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Tiamat
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Cleave/Crescent trigger classes, Crescent cooldown, cast-windup timing, and offset-radius execution semantics
